{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323185907B6F56BE338B0CB565CD8\"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540290363629388606","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说看了十多年，才发现小说还是太有逻辑了，太合理了，跟真实的历史比起来，缺乏那种荒诞感。历史中有些事太过于荒诞可笑，以至于令人觉得虚假，可它又偏偏是真的。写小说的谁敢那样写呢？读者觉得不合理就会骂作者。但是苍天的剧本往往就不合理，但似乎又很合理。大巧不工，也许只有造物主才能写出这么神奇的故事吧","text_exts":[{"e":135,"s":132,"text":"造物主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E9%80%A0%E7%89%A9%E4%B8%BB\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263547CB565CD8%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227540290363629388606%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227412896317959064600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%80%A0%E7%89%A9%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755616208,"group_id":"7412896317959064600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5PsN1mo6gJXU2Oe9TGKq8g/oJSaVJSgacB/gW/31tQx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4325924816032796","user_name":"无聊到想生一百个孩子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4325924816032796","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412896317959064600","book_info":{"abstract":"看得我火冒三丈，如此强盛的宋朝为何屈辱求和三百年。这是一本白话宋史之作，完整描述了从五代时期赵匡胤从军开国至南宋灭亡的三百多年历史。围绕宋朝十八位皇帝，展现宋朝历代的宫廷内斗，对外征战等一系列事件；详细描述了皇帝、外戚、权臣之间的权力斗争，宋朝历代的政策，以及与夏、辽、金之间的战争细节。全书写尽宋朝三百年的兴衰变革与历史谜团，生动展现了有宋一代的风流人物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/4b09b441c66c2b03db658af580b8cde4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"高天流云","author_id":"","book_id":"7412896317959064600","book_name":"如果这是宋史（全7册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"5.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7412896376826104894","read_count":"2013","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1531684"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"173","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b09b441c66c2b03db658af580b8cde4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779447547\u0026x-signature=vx6xpiixe7HJ4ukKkalZ7GI4s8o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"107"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323185907B6F56BE338B0CB565CD8\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":21896,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":88077,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1611},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7487614738265162521","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"误我，宋钦宗哪有把李纲的家人送给金人，史料无载的事情"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743348103,"group_id":"7412896317959064600","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"63860286434"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412896317959064600","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"309"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读52小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":187943,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7484483289517343513","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"宋史这块算是番茄最全面的一本了，书写的很不错，就是作者的情绪输出蛮多"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742620537,"group_id":"7412896317959064600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"朝距菩提暮大罗，雄关阻道不嫌寞。\n平生唯爱七尺剑，斩吾见我我非我。\n","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ncj54fhdODMamHgyBdmks=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cff4267bafe84a05b659c00b70a0ac33~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792541\u0026x-signature=mLjppDiXc5vpjrhhLgWGizOE9Do%3D","user_id":"63860286434","user_name":"玉水明沙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"63860286434","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1618025816,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":28,"name":"冒姓琅琊","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/ad92208050a72d2a1ddc2c068a63a154~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url"
